---
title: "2026-04-26_hw03"
date: "2026-04-26"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    css: style.css
---


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(bootstrap)
library(MASS)
library(boot)

set.seed(202604)
```


# Problem One

```{r}
data("law")
```


## Part I

```{r}
r_hat_q1 <- cor(law$LSAT, law$GPA)
r_hat_q1
```


```{r}
z_hat_q1 <- 0.5 * log((1 + r_hat_q1) / (1 - r_hat_q1))
z_hat_q1
```


```{r}
n <- nrow(law)
se_z <- 1 / sqrt(n - 3)

# 95% CI on z scale
z_lower <- z_hat_q1 - qnorm(0.975) * se_z
z_upper <- z_hat_q1 + qnorm(0.975) * se_z

# back-transform to correlation scale
ci_rho <- tanh(c(z_lower, z_upper))
```


```{r}
r_hat_q1
z_hat_q1
se_z
ci_rho
```


## Part II

### Bootstrap

```{r}
set.seed(202604)

B <- 1000
r_star <- numeric(B)

for(b in 1:B){
  idx <- sample(1:n, size = n, replace = TRUE)
  law_star <- law[idx, ]
  
  r_star[b] <- cor(law_star$LSAT, law_star$GPA)
}

se_B <- sd(r_star)
se_B
```


### Confidence Interval

```{r}
set.seed(202604)
alpha <- 0.05
z_crit <- qnorm(1 - alpha / 2)

# a) standard normal bootstrap CI
ci_normal_boot <- c(
  r_hat_q1 - z_crit * se_B,
  r_hat_q1 + z_crit * se_B
)

# b) corrected percentile CI
q_025 <- quantile(r_star, probs = 0.025)
q_975 <- quantile(r_star, probs = 0.975)

ci_corrected_percentile <- c(
  2 * r_hat_q1 - q_975,
  2 * r_hat_q1 - q_025
)

# c) percentile CI
ci_percentile <- c(
  q_025,
  q_975
)

ci_normal_boot
ci_corrected_percentile
ci_percentile
```


## Part III

```{r}
r_hat <- 0.7763745
rho_pop <- 0.776

ci_table <- data.frame(
  Method = c(
    "Fisher z normal approximation",
    "Standard normal bootstrap",
    "Corrected percentile bootstrap",
    "Percentile bootstrap"
  ),
  Lower = c(0.4385108, 0.5107711, 0.5935482, 0.4528802),
  Upper = c(0.9219648, 1.0419778, 1.0998688, 0.9592008)
)

ci_table$Contains_rho_pop <- with(ci_table, Lower <= rho_pop & Upper >= rho_pop)

ci_table$Left_distance <- r_hat - ci_table$Lower
ci_table$Right_distance <- ci_table$Upper - r_hat

ci_table$Symmetric_about_r_hat <- abs(ci_table$Left_distance - ci_table$Right_distance) < 0.01

ci_table
```
